reviews.comment:
Atención, el 22/06/19 a las 10 hs solicité al muchacho que atiende que me cargara 500 pesos de nafta, cometí el error de darle la tarjeta YPF por los puntos y el dinero, al devolverme la tarjeta negó rotundamente el pago y me cobró nuevamente 👎👎 solicito al dueño verifique e identifique al ladrón que tiene como empleado, supongo debe tener cámaras

(Translated by Google)
Attention, on 06/22/19 at 10 am I asked the boy who serves to charge me 500 pesos of gasoline, I made the mistake of giving him the YPF card for the points and the money, when returning the card to me he flatly denied payment and charged me again 👎👎 I ask the owner to verify and identify the thief he has as an employee, I suppose he must have cameras
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3118761116116586620/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURrMkttRk9BEAE
